summary: Soul Score Consistency Testing - Fixed inconsistency bug in what-mira-knows endpoint. All backend APIs pass (13/13). Frontend testing partially completed - Soul Score badge navigation works correctly.

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Soul Score inconsistency between endpoints - what-mira-knows returned 63.1% while pet-soul/profile returned 56.1%
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Changed from using calculate_overall_score (pet_soul_routes.py) to calculate_pet_soul_score (pet_score_logic.py) which is the correct calculation function used by server.py
bug_fixes_applied.status: FIXED - All 3 endpoints now return consistent 56.1% score

backend.quick_questions_endpoint: PASS - Returns max 3 questions from diverse folders
backend.what_mira_knows_endpoint: PASS - Returns combined soul knowledge + memories
backend.soul_score_consistency: PASS - All 3 endpoints return consistent score (56.1%)

frontend.soul_score_badge_navigation: PASS - Badge in Mira Demo navigates to /my-pets?pet={petId}
frontend.what_mira_knows_section: IMPLEMENTED - Code exists in MyPets.jsx lines 964-1077 with proper data-testid
frontend.mobile_responsive: NOT FULLY TESTED - Browser automation crashed on My Pets page

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Soul score calculation inconsistency - was using wrong calculation function from pet_soul_routes.py instead of pet_score_logic.py
The stored overall_score in database (63.1%) differs from calculated score (56.1%) - this is expected as calculations change but stored values remain
Two score calculation systems exist: 8-folder system (pet_soul_routes.py) and weighted-category system (pet_score_logic.py) - server.py uses the latter

success_rate.frontend: Partially tested due to browser crashes

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test pet Mojo (pet-99a708f1722a)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully tested and passing. Soul Score badge click navigation verified. The what-mira-knows API endpoint fixed to use correct score calculation. MyPets.jsx has the 'What Mira Knows' section implemented at lines 964-1077 but browser automation had issues loading the full page.
